content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.reasoning.causal
FILE: cosmos/core/reasoning/causal.py (130 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Causal Reasoning Engine.

"You changed the outcome by measuring it!"

This module implements Causal Inference capabilities (The "Why" and "What If").
It moves beyond correlation to understanding cause-and-effect relationships via Causal Graphs.

Features:
1. Causal Graph Construction: Builds 

CLASSES:
- CausalNode
- CausalGraph: Directed Acyclic Graph representing causal dependencies.
  Methods: def add_causality(self, cause: str, effect: str, strength: float=1.0, lag: float=0.0)
  Methods: def get_causes(self, effect: str) -> list[str]
  Methods: def get_effects(self, cause: str) -> list[str]
- CausalEngine: The inference engine for causal reasoning.
  Methods: def simulate_intervention(self, intervention_node: str) -> dict[str, float]
  Methods: def generate_counterfactual(self, observed_effect: str, original_cause: str, alternative_cause: str)
